flags.title: Dematter TACOS 92.3% vs 35% target · 7d spend $1,402
flags.problem: Emergency Dematter 7d ad spend $1,402.42 / 7d SC sales ~$1,497. TACOS 92.3% vs 35% August target. ROAS recovered to GREEN (2.117 Jul 21 > 2.07 breakeven). Two consecutive non-RED days (YELLOW Jul 20 → GREEN Jul 21) = bid reduction window open per L-2026-07-08-001. Organic ranks improving on all tracked keywords (H10 Jul 21: 'dematting comb' +15, 'dematting tool' +2).

solutions.recommendation: Reduce keyword bids 10–15% on highest-spend Dematter campaigns to compress TACOS toward 35% August target
solutions.action: Ad Console → Campaigns → filter B0FQL56V99 / SKU 3I-97VO-78X4 → sort ad groups by 7d spend desc → top 2-3 ad groups → Keywords → select all → reduce bids 10-15%. Do NOT pause. Check Jul 24 data before second reduction. Goal: $700/7d spend to reach ~50% TACOS, then ratchet to 35%.

solutions.recommendation: Audit emergency-dematter-cream mobile landing page before any new Dematter creative spend
solutions.action: Visit https://www.skipthegroomer.com/products/emergency-dematter-cream on mobile. Check: price visibility, CTA above fold, checkout friction. Organic traffic strong — drop-off is likely post-click.

flags.title: Klaviyo flows $0 revenue · Week 4 · Browse Abandonment DRAFT

solutions.recommendation: Activate Browse Abandonment immediately and audit Shopify↔Klaviyo integration
solutions.action: Klaviyo → Flows → Flow Rn6AGa → set status to Live. Then: Shopify Admin → Apps → Klaviyo → verify Connected. Check Klaviyo Analytics → Metrics → Viewed Product for event flow. Zero recipients across all live flows = integration break requiring manual repair.
